data.HEADLINE: Why they don't convert
data.BULLET_1: You gave away the what, not the how
data.BULLET_2: It solves a problem they don't know they have
data.BULLET_3: The follow-up treats them like a cold lead
data.BULLET_4: No next step after the PDF lands
data.BULLET_5: The offer has nothing to do with the magnet

data.HEADLINE: What actually converts
data.BULLET_1: A tool they use once and want again
data.BULLET_2: A checklist that exposes a real problem
data.BULLET_3: A teardown of a specific live example
data.BULLET_4: A single email with a direct offer
